name: visioncut-ai
description: AI-powered video editing system that understands reference videos and recreates similar edits using your own footage

scripts.dev:workers: cd workers && python -m uvicorn reference_analyzer.main:app --reload --port 8001 & python -m uvicorn clip_analyzer.main:app --reload --port 8002 & python -m uvicorn timeline_builder.main:app --reload --port 8003 & python -m uvicorn renderer.main:app --reload --port 8004 & python -m uvicorn style_engine.main:app --reload --port 8005 & python -m uvicorn feedback_engine.main:app --reload --port 8006
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../workers && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type d -name .next -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null
